salt-grain.name: klayout-pi
salt-grain.title: IR Drop Analysis
salt-grain.doc:
Static IR drop analysis for SG13G2 layouts.
External dependencies (NOT installed by this package — provide separately): - kpex (klayout-pex, Python package or CLI entry point) - magic (open-source layout tool) - ngspice (circuit simulator) - PDK (defaults to ihp-sg13g2; magicrc looked up via PDK_ROOT)
The macro adds 'IR Analysis' under the Tools menu.
salt-grain.author: Saif Khattak
